name: Voidtouched Tower Shield
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 5% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you will gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you will lose a stack of Darklight. Based on your role, each stack of Darklight will grant the following bonus: DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost, Tank: -0.6% Incoming Damage, Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Max 10 Stacks. Stack bonuses are doubled in Wildspace.

name: Voidtouched Battleaxe
setBonus: 2 of Set: Gain 5% Overall Outgoing Healing and -5% Incoming Damage. When in Wildspace, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 2s in combat with a single opponent, you will gain a stack of Darklight. Every 2s in combat with 4 or more opponents, you will lose a stack of Darklight. Based on your role, each stack of Darklight will grant the following bonus: DPS: +0.6% Base Damage Boost, Tank: -0.6% Incoming Damage, Healer: +0.6% Overall Outgoing Healing. Max 10 Stacks. Stack bonuses are doubled in Wildspace.

name: Meteoric Iron Tower Shield
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 3% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2% Base Damage Boost, Tank: -4% Incoming Damage, Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

name: Meteoric Iron Mace
setBonus: 2 of Set: Deal or heal up to 3% additional damage based on the difference in hit point percentage between the player and the target. You are granted the following, depending on your role: DPS: +2% Base Damage Boost, Tank: -4% Incoming Damage, Healer: +4% Overall Outgoing Healing. This effect does not stack. When in Wildspace, the role bonus is doubled, and your Movement Speed is increased by 10%.

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Stamina
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.4% Stamina Regeneration and 0.8% Awareness. Max 10 Stacks: 4% Stamina Regeneration and 8% Awareness.

equipBonuses.name: Rothe's Intimidation
equipBonuses.description: Upon taking critical damage, you have a 25% chance to explode with fury, dealing damage and additional threat to enemies within 15'. You also gain -2.5% Incoming Damage for 5s. (10s cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Sudden Intuition
equipBonuses.description: Whenever you are struck by Combat Advantage damage, you have a 20% chance to increase your Awareness and Deflect Severity by 7.5% for 8 seconds. (15 second cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Critical Resilience
equipBonuses.description: Gain up to 5% Critical Avoidance and -2.5% Incoming Damage based on your missing health. The max bonus is achieved at 25% or less health.

equipBonuses.name: Channeler's Focus
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.5% Outgoing Healing and 0.5% Power. Max 10 Stacks: 5% Outgoing Healing and 5% Power.

equipBonuses.name: Medic's Respite
equipBonuses.description: Healing an ally with an Encounter power also heals you for 80,000 and grants Allies within 25' 1.5% Awareness and Incoming Healing for 5s.

equipBonuses.name: Divine Inspiration
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity maximum increases by 25%. Gain 2.5% Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Galactic Muse
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regenerates 20% faster while in Wildspace. In non-Wildspace, the regen bonus is 10%. Gain 2.5% Outgoing Healing.

equipBonuses.name: Warden's Stamina
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 0.5% Stamina Regeneration and 0.35% Awareness. Max Stacks: 7 (10 in Wildspace).

equipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Critical Resilience
equipBonuses.description: Upon taking critical damage in Wildspace, you have a 25% chance to gain -5% Incoming Damage for 5s. In non-Wildspace, gain -2.5% Incoming Damage for 5s. (10s cooldown)

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Alacrity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Recharge Speed is increased by 0.6% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 3% Recharge Speed.

equipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Fortified Ally
equipBonuses.description: -2% Incoming Damage and 2.5% Incoming Healing in Wildspace. -1% Incoming Damage and 2.5% Incoming Healing in non-Wildspace.

equipBonuses.name: Galactic Muse
equipBonuses.description: Your Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regenerates 10% faster while in Wildspace. In non-Wildspace, the regen bonus is 5%. Gain 2.5% Outgoing Healing.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Alacrity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Recharge Speed is increased by 0.6% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 3% Recharge Speed.

equipBonuses.name: Survivor's Gift
equipBonuses.description: Your current Hit Points increases your Outgoing Healing, up to a max of 6%, and your Power up to a max of 4,375. Currently: 6% Outgoing Healing and 4,375 Power.

equipBonuses.name: Wildspace Gladiator
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 1% Critical Strike. Max Stacks: 7 (13 in Wildspace).

equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 892 Power and Combat Advantage. Max 5 stacks: 4,462 Power and Combat Advantage.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Strength
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Power is increased by 1,340 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 6,700 Power.

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Criticals
equipBonuses.description: Gain a stack of 335 Critical Strike for 10 seconds when you strike an enemy, lose a stack when you are struck. Max 20 Stacks: 6,700 Critical Strike.

equipBonuses.name: Medic's Mercy
equipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 670 Outgoing Healing and 0.5% Forte. Max Stacks: 5 - 3,350 Outgoing Healing and 2.5% Forte.

equipBonuses.name: Spelljammer's Harmony
equipBonuses.description: You gain 3,350 Outgoing Healing. While in Wildspace, teammates who are 25' or closer to you gain 1% Defense.

equipBonuses.name: Challenger's Alacrity
equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Recharge Speed is increased by 0.2% every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 10 stacks: 2% Recharge Speed.

equipBonuses.name: Controlled Divinity
equipBonuses.description: Gain a stack of 0.6% Divinity/Performance/Soulweave regeneration for 15 seconds when you heal an ally, lose a stack when you are struck. Max 10 Stacks: 6% Regen.

equipBonuses.name: Defender's Stamina

equipBonuses.description: Gain 3,350 Awareness, and an additional 2.5% Recharge Speed in Wildspace.

equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only 1 enemy, your Deflect is increased by 1,340 every 2 seconds. Every 2 seconds you are in combat with 4 or more enemies, lose 1 stack. Max 5 stacks: 6,700 Deflect.

equipBonuses.description: When in combat with only one enemy, gain 6,700 Deflect Severity. This bonus is divided by the total number of enemies you are in combat with.
